name: RebarHookData
summary: The RebarHookData class defines the hook at the end of a reinforcing bar. Hooks are used for anchoring purposes.

constructors.name: RebarHookData
constructors.summary: Instantiates a rebar hook data instance with empty members.

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: The angle of the hook. The value is between -270 to +270 degrees.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: The length of the straight part of the hook.

properties.name: Radius
properties.summary: The bending radius of the hook.

properties.name: Shape
properties.summary: Defines the shape of the hook. The options are: NO_HOOK. Sets the angle, radius and length to 0.HOOK_90_DEGREES.HOOK_135_DEGREES.HOOK_180_DEGREES.CUSTOM_HOOK. The angle, radius and length values have to be set manually.
